note: OWNER-CONTROLLED. Machines never write this file. A decision attaches plural typed credits to one canonical performance and explicitly states whether review coverage is partial or complete. Every support cites a pinned receipt and supplies exact maker/work/target/production spans plus an applicability rationale. Design-lineage credits additionally require a pinned bridge to the DS9 performance. Signals in maker-evidence.json are triage hints only and can never satisfy validation.

schema.coverage: partial | complete (an explicit owner assertion; never inferred)

role.category: makeup_design | creature_design | costume_design | makeup_supervision | makeup_application | prosthetic_makeup | sculpting | fabrication | mold_making | mask_suit_build | creature_effects | other
role.source_label: exact wording from the cited receipt that establishes the work

supports.maker_basis: exact receipt span naming the maker
supports.target_basis: exact receipt span naming the target
supports.production_basis: exact receipt span binding the work to DS9 or a DS9 episode

schema.rationale: owner reasoning for selected credits and coverage
